metadata.description: Personal collection of Claude Code skills.

plugins.name: human-friendly
plugins.description: Renders structured responses (plans, designs, architecture notes) as editable HTML artifacts on the user's Desktop instead of as chat markdown. The HTML has designMode editing, ⌘S file-save via the File System Access API, structural ⌘Z undo, hover add-row/col on tables, markdown-style block shortcuts (# / - / 1. / > / ``` / /table), inline backtick code wrapping, Backspace-to-escape-format, Tab/Shift+Tab list indent, and live-reload on external file changes.
